title: SPAIN enforcement action against SERVICIOS INMOBILIARIOS Y GESTIÓN RCL MADRID, S.L. (600)
summary: Insufficient cooperation with supervisory authority The Spanish DPA has imposd a fine of EUR 600 on SERVICIOS INMOBILIARIOS Y ESTIÓN RCL MADRID, S.L. The controller failed to react to multiple requests by the DPA. Legal basis: Art. 58 (1) GDPR.
dedupKey: spain enforcement action against servicios inmobiliarios y gestion rcl madrid s l 600|2026-03-13
